image_prompts.prompt: Hook visual: Here's what science actually says about molecular mimicry.
Context visual: Molecular mimicry is when one molecule resembles another, tricking the immune system.
Escalation visual: This can lead to autoimmune diseases when the body attacks itself, mistaking its own cells for invaders.
Evidence visual: Studies show links between infections and autoimmune disorders, but research is ongoing.
Payoff visual: Understanding this could revolutionize how we treat these diseases.
Cta visual: Want to dive deeper into science? Like and follow for more intriguing insights!
